feed.title: Tammy Makes Things - projects
feed.subtitle: hardware hacking, python, making stuff, etc.

entry.title: New Project - fw_neopixel_pride
entry.summary:
New Project - fw_neopixel_pride

I’ve uploaded a guide for my latest project. I call it fw_neopxiel_pride, and it’s a simple piece of wearable jewelry for LGBTQ Pride month, built with a microcontroller and CircuitPython. The project guide is here, and you can find the code on GitHub. Check it …
entry.content:
New Project - fw_neopixel_pride

I’ve uploaded a guide for my latest project. I call it fw_neopxiel_pride, and it’s a simple piece of wearable jewelry for LGBTQ Pride month, built with a microcontroller and CircuitPython. The project guide is here, and you can find the code on GitHub. Check it out, and Happy Pride!
